mapper.sql: id, user_id, analysis_name, target_count, best_score, average_score, fallback_count, best_target_role, resume_text, project_highlights, target_company_type, result_json, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_battle_match_record ( user_id, analysis_name, target_count, best_score, average_score, fallback_count, best_target_role, resume_text, project_highlights, target_company_type, result_json, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{analysisName}, #{targetCount}, #{bestScore}, #{averageScore}, #{fallbackCount}, #{bestTargetRole}, #{resumeText}, #{projectHighlights}, #{targetCompanyType}, #{resultJson}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id, analysis_name, target_count, best_score, average_score, fallback_count, best_target_role, create_time, update_time FROM job_battle_match_record
user_id = #{userId}
AND ( analysis_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') OR best_target_role LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM job_battle_match_record WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM job_battle_match_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
